label: http api • /v1/chat/completions SSE: chunk shape, role-first delta, [DONE]
query: Say hello in exactly one short sentence.
notes: The streaming contract row: every data: line must parse as a chat.completion.chunk with a stable id, the FIRST delta must carry the assistant role, exactly one chunk carries a terminal finish_reason, and the stream ends with the literal [DONE] sentinel. Runs against the shared in-process OsaurusServer on an ephemeral loopback port. Off-CI (needs a model).
